title: Other foreign income
description: How to report attributed personal services income when you lodge your return using myTax.

content_blocks.text: You are not eligible to use myTax this year if, during 2014–15, you had foreign income that was not from a foreign pension or annuity, or from a managed fund.

items: foreign investment income including foreign rent

content_blocks.text: Use e-t ax this year, but check again next year because we will continue to improve myTax .

content_text:
You are not eligible to use myTax this year if, during 2014–15, you had foreign income that was not from a foreign pension or annuity, or from a managed fund.
This includes:
- foreign employment income
- foreign investment income including foreign rent
- foreign business income
- capital gains on overseas assets.
Use e-t ax this year, but check again next year because we will continue to improve myTax .
